penalties.description: The marked circle was not completely cut out and freed from the gauze by the end of the video sequence.

reasoning: The video shows cutting activity around a green marked circle on gauze. The cutting follows portions of the marked line but the circle is never completely freed or released from the gauze material. Since the task requires complete circle cut-out and this was not achieved, an incomplete_circle penalty results in task failure with zero score. Timing was estimated based on the cutting activity duration visible in the frames.
